title: olsynium biflorum
intro: Olsynium biflorum, also known as the mountain shooting star, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Olsynium biflorum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to improve respiratory and digestive health. Herbal preparations of Olsynium biflorum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the roots or flowers in water or a solvent.
